columns.downstream_use: Account identification — lead sheets, classification, exception attribution
Balance verification, exception detection, anomaly aggregation
Balance verification, exception detection, anomaly aggregation

issues.message: Balance check skipped — net-balance layout detected. The credit role is filled by a Dr/Cr indicator column, not a numeric balance. Confirm the sign convention before downstream balance verification.
issues.remediation: Re-export the file as a one-sided Debit/Credit trial balance, or confirm the Dr/Cr indicator semantics so Paciolus can derive a signed view of the balances.
issues.downstream_impact: An out-of-balance trial balance invalidates all downstream diagnostic results. Debit/credit totals must reconcile before any testing can proceed.

issues.message: 1 rows have zero balance in both debit and credit columns (3% of rows)
issues.remediation: Zero-balance rows add noise to the analysis. Consider filtering them out if they represent closed or inactive accounts.
issues.downstream_impact: Zero-balance rows add noise to statistical tests (Benford's Law, sampling), inflate account counts, and reduce the signal-to-noise ratio in anomaly detection.

preflight.rendered_conclusion: The trial balance file (tb_hartwell.docx) achieved a Readiness Score of 85.0/100 — assessed as Ready with caveats. The file is suitable for downstream diagnostic testing subject to the following caveat: (1) Balance check skipped — net-balance layout detected. The credit role is filled by a Dr/Cr indicator column, not a numeric balance. Confirm the sign convention before downstream balance verification.. Map all balance columns explicitly, or re-export the trial balance with a single Debit/Credit pair before re-uploading. Remediate before final workpaper sign-off.
